emails.subject: FW: <<Concur Expense Document>> - October 17, 2001
emails.body: FW: <<Concur Expense Document>> October 17, 2001 what about don schroeder's To: Jeffrey Shankman

emails.subject: RE: <<Concur Expense Document>> - October 17, 2001
emails.body: RE: <<Concur Expense Document>> October 17, 2001 I have not done anything to get this forwarded to you yet, so John's admin must have set it up with you as the approver. I will work on getting Don's set up to come to you as well as getting copies for the past several months for both. S To: Funkhouser, Shanna

emails.subject: RE: <<Concur Expense Document>> - October 17, 2001
emails.body: RE: <<Concur Expense Document>> October 17, 2001 Just confirmed with Nowlan's admin that you are the approver in XMS the expense report system) for both Nowlan and Schroeder. Delores will also make you copies of the past two months' reports for both. Shanna To: Funkhouser, Shanna

emails.subject: RE: <<Concur Expense Document>> - October 17, 2001
emails.body: I haven't seen an expense report for schroeder ever. To: Shankman, Jeffrey A.

emails.subject: RE: <<Concur Expense Document>> - October 17, 2001
emails.body: Delores is copying the last few months and has set up the system such that you are the approver on all future expense reports. To: Funkhouser, Shanna

emails.subject: RE: <<Concur Expense Document>> - October 17, 2001
emails.body: Thanks. I asked her over a month ago to do this. To: Shankman, Jeffrey A.

emails.subject: RE: <<Concur Expense Document>> - October 17, 2001
emails.body: Also, I left a voicemail with Beth Perlman on Rob Bogucki's guy. I'm out tomorrow, please follow up with her. Jeff To: Shankman, Jeffrey A.
